# theme.js emission template

The theme.js file is generated mechanically from `DESIGN-LOCK.md.global`. No creative decisions — pure transcription.

## Output location

`<app_id>/shared/theme.js`

## Template

```javascript
/*
 * theme.js — design tokens for <app_id>
 * Generated by cv-create from DESIGN-LOCK.md
 * Do not edit by hand — regenerate via cv-create.
 */

'use strict';

var DARK = {
    bg:         '<global.palette_dark.bg>',
    panel:      '<global.palette_dark.panel>',
    panel_hi:   '<global.palette_dark.panel_hi>',
    edge:       '<global.palette_dark.edge>',
    text:       '<global.palette_dark.text>',
    text_dim:   '<global.palette_dark.text_dim>',
    text_faint: '<global.palette_dark.text_faint>',
    series:     ['<series[0]>','<series[1]>','<series[2]>','<series[3]>','<series[4]>'],
    accent:     '<global.brand.accent>'
};

var LIGHT = {
    // Independently designed — NOT a dark-inversion.
    bg:         '<global.palette_light.bg>',
    panel:      '<global.palette_light.panel>',
    panel_hi:   '<global.palette_light.panel_hi>',
    edge:       '<global.palette_light.edge>',
    text:       '<global.palette_light.text>',
    text_dim:   '<global.palette_light.text_dim>',
    text_faint: '<global.palette_light.text_faint>',
    series:     ['<series[0]>','<series[1]>','<series[2]>','<series[3]>','<series[4]>'],
    accent:     '<global.brand.accent_light_variant_or_same>'
};

// === FONTS ===
// Base64-embedded so the viz works in any Splunk install without external font requests.
var FONTS = {
    display: '<display.family>, <display.fallback>',
    mono:    '<mono.family>, <mono.fallback>'
};

// Font @font-face declarations are embedded into visualization.css per viz.
// See cv-create's font-embedding step.

// === HELPERS ===

function getTheme(mode) {
    return mode === 'light' ? LIGHT : DARK;
}

function withAlpha(hex, alpha) {
    if (!hex || hex.charAt(0) !== '#') return hex;
    var r = parseInt(hex.slice(1, 3), 16);
    var g = parseInt(hex.slice(3, 5), 16);
    var b = parseInt(hex.slice(5, 7), 16);
    return 'rgba(' + r + ',' + g + ',' + b + ',' + alpha + ')';
}

function lerpColor(a, b, t) {
    var ar = parseInt(a.slice(1, 3), 16);
    var ag = parseInt(a.slice(3, 5), 16);
    var ab = parseInt(a.slice(5, 7), 16);
    var br = parseInt(b.slice(1, 3), 16);
    var bg = parseInt(b.slice(3, 5), 16);
    var bb = parseInt(b.slice(5, 7), 16);
    var r = Math.round(ar + (br - ar) * t);
    var g = Math.round(ag + (bg - ag) * t);
    var bl = Math.round(ab + (bb - ab) * t);
    return '#' + ((1 << 24) + (r << 16) + (g << 8) + bl).toString(16).slice(1);
}

function getSeriesColor(idx, theme) {
    return theme.series[idx % theme.series.length];
}

function getSpacing(w) {
    return Math.max(4, Math.round(w * 0.025));
}

function getTypoScale(w, h) {
    var dim = Math.min(w, h);
    return {
        hero:    Math.max(36, Math.min(72, dim * 0.35)),
        body:    Math.max(14, Math.min(24, dim * 0.14)),
        whisper: Math.max(8,  Math.min(11, dim * 0.07))
    };
}

function tintNeutral(grey, brandHex, amount) {
    if (!amount) amount = 0.04;
    return lerpColor(grey, brandHex, amount);
}

module.exports = {
    DARK: DARK,
    LIGHT: LIGHT,
    FONTS: FONTS,
    getTheme: getTheme,
    withAlpha: withAlpha,
    lerpColor: lerpColor,
    getSeriesColor: getSeriesColor,
    getSpacing: getSpacing,
    getTypoScale: getTypoScale,
    tintNeutral: tintNeutral
};
```

## Substitution rules

Replace every `<placeholder>` with the exact value from DESIGN-LOCK.md. Strip quotes if the value is already a hex string. Quote string values; do not quote numbers or arrays.

If a key is missing from DESIGN-LOCK.md (e.g., `palette_dark.text_faint` not set), report which key is missing and stop. Do not invent fallback values.

## Font embedding (handled separately)

Base64 font embedding happens in each viz's `visualization.css`, not in theme.js. theme.js only records the font name + fallback chain.

For each font in `global.typography`:

1. Download from Google Fonts in WOFF2 format
2. Base64-encode the WOFF2 binary
3. Emit a `@font-face` block at the top of `<app_id>/appserver/static/visualizations/<viz>/visualization.css`:

```css
@font-face {
  font-family: '<family>';
  font-weight: <weight>;
  font-style: normal;
  src: url(data:font/woff2;base64,<base64-blob>) format('woff2');
}
```

This makes the viz self-contained — no external font requests required at runtime.
